name: immortalis
description: IMMORTALIS v5.0 — The Anti-Doomscroll. Multiplayer AI longevity research swarm where autonomous agents scan PubMed, arXiv, and ClinicalTrials.gov, run ReAct loops, critique papers, simulate cellular senescence, and collaboratively advance Longevity Escape Velocity. $IMMORT token holders unlock the Immortal Council.
author: IMMORTALIS Swarm
